arts.ttl: McTominay earns leaders Napoli 1-0 win at Torino
arts.sum: A first half goal by Scott McTominay earned leaders Napoli a 1-0 win at Torino in Serie A on Sunday to keep them clear at the top of the standings.

arts.ttl: Conte: ‘Napoli got it right choosing McTominay’

arts.ttl: McTominay goal gives Serie A leader Napoli win over Torino as Lazio loses ground
arts.sum: Napoli ground out a 1-0 win at Torino to ensure it will end the weekend still top of a tight Serie A table, while at least one of its opponents dropped points on Sunday. Scott McTominay scored the only goal of the match in the first half as Napoli pulled away from one of its closest rivals as Lazio lost 3-1 at relegation-threatened Parma.

arts.ttl: Buongiorno’s journey: From Torino’s heart to Napoli’s ambition
arts.sum: Alessandro Buongiorno’s return to Turin for the fourteenth matchday of Serie A marks a special challenge as he faces his former team, Torino, for the first time since joining Napoli. The 24-year-old defender’s summer transfer was not without its share of drama and emotion, particularly given his deep-rooted connection to Torino. Buongiorno’s story with Torino began at the tender age of seven when he joined the youth academy. His journey from ball boy to first-team player and eventually captain is a testament to his talent and dedication. It didn’t take long for him to capture the hearts of Torino fans, The post Buongiorno’s journey: From Torino’s heart to Napoli’s ambition appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Napooli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Napoli prepare to face Torino, manager Antonio Conte is likely to maintain his preferred lineup, with only reserve full-back Pasquale Mazzocchi sidelined due to a recent leg injury. The Azzurri’s absence from European competitions this season has allowed Conte to establish a consistent starting eleven, particularly in defense. The midfield will see Scott McTominay providing support to Napoli’s potent attacking trio. In the final third, the highly-coveted Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, reportedly a target for Manchester United, will combine with Matteo Politano and Romelu Lukaku.
